prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约2881名，2024年约3568名（近年最高），2025年大幅前移至约2276名，近3年波动较大，2025年基准约2276名；本省理科计划 2023年35人，2024年37人，2025年37人；2026年计划34人，较2025年缩招约8.1%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名约第36 名（2026年），近年排名稳定在前40，属于顶尖211院校；近年声誉评价中性偏稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第65位，评价为一般，短视频平台关注度 中等；无投档断档记录；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、光学工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024-2025年持续高热推荐，计算机类高热但略有降温，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，与该校优势专业高度契合，吸引高分考生报考；本省2025年理 科考生约5.25万人，2026年总考生约23.8万人（按历史比例估算理科约16.3万人），考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧，反 映整体竞争强度提升；南京理工大学位于江苏省南京市，属东部发达地区，对新疆考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在新疆理科招生计划占比较小（约34人），属跨 省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移后的高位基准、2026年招生计划小幅缩招、本省考生规模显著扩大以， 预计2026年最低位次在2025年2276名基础上略有后移。预测最低位次约2215名，区间1883-2547名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（信息通信与光电感知方向）
- 计算机类
- 自动化类
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 兵器类（智能无人系统方向/智能发射与动力方向）
- 机械类（智能设计制造方向）
- 能源与动力工程（芯片热控实验班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料科学与工程（空天材料工程实验班）
- 材料物理（半导体AI芯片实验班）
- 机械类（智能仪器方向）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1883-2547名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1883名以内）可重点冲刺电子信息类、计算机类等王牌专 业；位次在区间中段（约2100-2300名）建议以兵器类、机械类等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限（2547名附近）建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 2881, in 2024 approximately 3568 (highest in recent years), and in 2025 it significantly moved forward to approximately 2276, with large fluctuations in the past 3 years, and a baseline of approximately 2276 in 2025; the provincial science enrollment plan was 35 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 34, a reduction of about 8.1% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 36th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), stable in the top 40 in recent years, belonging to top-tier 211 institutions; recent reputation evaluation is neutral and stable, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 65th, rated as average, with moderate attention on short video platforms; no record of enrollment gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+ (national top), Optical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 4 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication categories were continuously hot and recommended in 2024-2025, Computer categories were hot but slightly cooling, Electrical Engineering and Automation was hot and recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous majors, attracting high-scoring candidates; the provincial science examinees in 2025 were about 52,500, and total examinees in 2026 were about 238,000 (estimated science about 163,000 based on historical proportions), with a significant increase in examinee numbers, markedly intensifying competition, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the eastern developed region, with strong regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates; the university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang is relatively small (about 34 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the high baseline after the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment plan in 2026, and the significant increase in the number of provincial examinees, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward from the 2025 baseline of 2276. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 2215, with a range of 1883-2547.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Information Communication and Optoelectronic Sensing Direction)
- Computer Science
- Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Weapons (Intelligent Unmanned Systems Direction/Intelligent Launch and Power Direction)
- Mechanical (Intelligent Design and Manufacturing Direction)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Chip Thermal Control Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Aerospace Materials Engineering Experimental Class)
- Materials Physics (Semiconductor AI Chip Experimental Class)
- Mechanical (Intelligent Instrumentation Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1883-2547, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1883), you can focus on aiming for top majors such as Electronic Information and Computer Science; if your ranking is in the middle of the range (approximately 2100-2300), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors such as Weapons and Mechanical; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 2547), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
